arts.ttl: Shortest Everton press conference I have ever covered shows refreshing change has been made
arts.sum: The brevity of Everton's pre-FA Cup press conference told a positive tale - that Everton are no longer the club in crisis

arts.ttl: Everton on course to make £217m announcement as Dan Friedkin unveils 'jewel in the crown'
David Moyes hopes Harrison Armstrong can follow Everton 'great' as Derby County sack manager
arts.sum: Everton manager David Moyes has been speaking about Harrison Armstrong who has joined Derby County on loan for the rest of the season

arts.ttl: David Moyes gives first impression of Carlos Alcaraz and verdict on Everton transfer window
arts.sum: Everton manager David Moyes has been speaking about his club's business in the winter transfer window and new signing Carlos Alcaraz before the FA Cup tie at home to Bournemouth

arts.ttl: Premier League confirm Player & Manager of the Month winners for January
arts.sum: The Premier League confirm the winners of the Player and Manager of the month prizes for January 2025.

arts.ttl: David Moyes press conference LIVE - Everton injury and Carlos Alcaraz latest for FA Cup clash
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (Joe Thomas, Chris Beesley, Paul Wheelock)
arts.sum: Live coverage of Everton manager David Moyes' press conference to preview the FA Cup fourth-round tie at home to Bournemouth

arts.ttl: Andoni Iraola wins Premier League manager of the month for unbeaten January
arts.sum: Andoni Iraola has won the Premier League manager of the month award as he led his Cherries side to an unbeaten January.

arts.ttl: Ex-Everton star lifts lid on life under David Moyes and why he's a better manager now
arts.sum: David Moyes' evolving managerial approach was discussed by former Everton defender Alan Stubbs on the latest episode of Goodison Park: My Home

arts.ttl: Kluivert wins first EA SPORTS Player of the Month award
arts.sum: Kluivert then ended the month with a goal and an assist in a 5-0 win over Nottingham Forest, ending their opponents' eight-match unbeaten run in the Premier League. The 25-year-old scored an equalising penalty in a draw at Chelsea before scoring a hat-trick and assisting Bournemouth's other goal in a 4-1 win away to a Newcastle United side who were undefeated in nine matches across all competitions.

arts.ttl: 'This is on a different scale' - New Everton Stadium feature has already sold out
arts.sum: The final bricks that will make up the emotional Everton Way at the club's new stadium have now been sold
